The intrepid pair quiz experts and conduct audacious stunts - including a nerve-wracking swim with a great white shark - to get answers. But they find more than they expected, discovering a whole host of strange and remarkable truths about the animal kingdom.

programme.desc: Yinxi escorts socialite Gina to Australia for an auction, Yinchen tags along. Gina sells her necklace at a high price to Mr and Mrs Yue Feihong. Right before the assignment ends, Yinxi gets into a conflict with Gina. The two sisters plan to meet after the mission, but Yinxi fails to show up unbeknownst to Yinchen, Yinxi is being pursued by a mysterious killer...

On their journey, they meet Tang Lian who is a disciple of the Tang sect. Together, the group of youths embark on an adventure.

Her gifts bring her to the attention of Emperor Qi, who takes her as his bride in order to help him manage the kingdom.

programme.desc: The jelly form LAC Joint Protec contains glucosamine, chondroitin, type 2 collagen, anti-inflammatory herbs, which help repair cartilage and relieve joint inflammation. It tastes good, is easy to take and convenient. Start "refueling" the cartilage and synovial fluid early so that the joints can be used for a longer time!

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 238
programme.desc: All-in-one knife, scissors and board bundle that makes your life easier with an in-built knife sharpener!

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 245
programme.desc: The Philips Azur 8000 Series Steam Iron delivers powerful performance with OptimalTEMP technology, ensuring that no fabric will be burned. The intelligent temperature control guarantees no scorching, allowing you to iron both horizontally and vertically with ease.

programme.title: No.17 Music Live House S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Five musicians, Liang Long, Hu Xia, Bai Jugang, Xilinnayi Gao, and Huang Zihongfan, have reversed their image as singers and became Live House staff, embarking on a new music journey with a brand-new attitude.

programme.title: Bravo, My Life - EP 25
programme.desc: (Dual Language Chinese and Korean) This series follows Xu Dongxi as she decides to raise her nephew as a single mother while struggling to establish herself as a designer.

programme.title: Devil-in-Law - EP 19
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) With Jia Nan's help, Wen Li finally finds out about the truth regarding the accident. She admits that she has fallen for Jia Nan.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 55
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Yajun tries to get information out of Xixiu, but Xixiu refuses to reveal who gave her the proposal. At the same time, Minghua uncovers the truth. It was Enzhu who handed over the proposal, with the deliberate aim of framing Zhi-en.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 56
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Zhi-en and Zhengmin plan to meet, but on the way, Zhengmin comes across Enzhu, who is anxious about her critically ill son. Out of kindness, he drives her to the hospital. Enzhu pretends to be ill to keep him from leaving, causing Zhengmin to miss his appointment with Zhi-en.

programme.title: Have A Nice Dream 2025 - EP 10
programme.desc: Penghu boasts stunning basalt and volcanic landscapes, rich with natural and marine treasures. In this episode, the team explores its most unique hidden gems - from rare columnar basalt cliffs and dense stone weir clusters to local delicacies like peanuts stir-fried on cowfish-stone stoves. They dive into Penghu’s blend of ocean beauty and wartime heritage, ending their adventure with an offshore quest to find traces of ancient whales.

programme.title: My Happy Ending - EP 12
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Shunyong looks to find Yaling’s biological father with Xiou's help, and Tae Ju meets Yunzhen.

programme.title: News Tonight - EP 56
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Have A Nice Dream 2025 - EP 10
programme.desc: Penghu boasts stunning basalt and volcanic landscapes, rich with natural and marine treasures. programme.title: Only For Love - EP 31
programme.desc: Hardworking financial reporter Zheng Shu Yi (Bai Lu) is determined to land a front-page story with Shi Yan (Dylan Wang) a successful young CEO that the whole city is talking about. She pulls all the stops, eventually gets through to him and even love blossoms.

programme.title: The Legend of Zhuohua - EP 25
programme.desc: Mu Zhuo Hua (Jing Tian), the illegitimate daughter of the richest man in Jiangnan, is determined to pass the civil service exam. She meets a poorly reputable general named Liu Yan (Feng Shao Feng) and forms an uneasy alliance, which eventually deepens into a closer bond.

programme.title: Billionaire Story - EP 456

programme.title: B for Busy
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Divorced Shanghai native Lao Bai's quiet life is stirred when he meets single mother Ms. Li. Things get complicated as carefree Gloria and his ex-wife Beibei also reappear. Over shared meals, love and connection unfold with wit and warmth in the heart of the city.

programme.title: Lost You Forever Season 1 - EP 21
programme.desc: Wandering in Dahuang, Xiao Yao loses her identity and settles in Qingshui Town as Wen Xiao Liu. She meets Prince Qiang Xuan, Tu Shan Jing, Xiang Liu, A Nian, Chi Shui Feng Long and gets intertwined in a story of kinship, love, and friendship.

programme.title: Kids' Lives Matter - EP 15
programme.desc: The story started 21 years ago where one surgery broke the relationship between pediatric surgeons Dr. Jonathan Hui (Kelvin Cheng) and Dr. Amos Fong (Kenneth Ma). They part ways after but were reunited in Princess Anne Hospital due to a special transplant surgery.

programme.desc: Dafa is a spoiled, innocent boy. It turns out he has a crush on the campus hottie, Wini. While he's watching Wini, he accidentally bumps into Indah, who agrees to babysit Dafa on campus. After a while, a misunderstanding arises between Dafa and Indah, which ultimately leads to Indah leaving and no longer babysitting Dafa.

programme.title: STAND UP COMEDY ACADEMY 4 - EP 18
programme.desc: Stand Up Comedy Academy (Season 4) is the fourth installment of the popular comedian talent search competition aired on Indosiar. This season features a refreshed lineup of hosts, bringing together the dynamic chemistry of Ayu Dewi, Gilang Dirga, Arie Kriting, Andhika Pratama, and Uus to lead the hunt for Indonesia’s next comedy star.

programme.title: Ketika Ada Yang Menyalakan Cintamu, Kamu Nanyea?
programme.desc: Eneng had to pretend to be crazy to date Dilan. Dilan is Abah Arga's grandson. Abah Arga set a condition for Dilan: he must marry a village girl in exchange for capital.

programme.title: HOT SHOT - EP 576
programme.desc: Program infotainment yang membahas kehidupan selebriti secara mendalam.

programme.title: Ngga Usah Ngadi Ngadi Nanti Kamu Jatuh Hati
programme.desc: Derry broke up with Vina after they had a fight and misunderstanding. Derry, who was now closer to Elsa, helped Elsa sell roasted corn. Derry's father, who found out about this, was angry with Derry and forbade him from approaching Elsa again. He preferred if Derry was with Vina. According to Derry's father, the hotel's image would be damaged if Derry remained with Elsa and helped Elsa sell roasted corn.

programme.title: THE SULTAN EMPIRE - EP 1
programme.desc: The Sultan Empire is a talk show featuring King Sultan Andre Taulany and Prince Raffi Ahmad, accompanied by a cast of hilarious royal guards. It features spectacular guest stars and is definitely not to be missed.

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2 - EP 40
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: DISEBELAH ADA SURGA - EP 13
programme.desc: The story of three young men named Andhika, Gading, and Uus. All three of them lack spiritual depth. They have spent their youth living carefree lives, indulging in pleasure without a care in the world about their future.

programme.title: Cewek Cromboloni Menyala Adindakuh
programme.desc: One day, while Dania (Nabila Zavira) was riding her motorcycle, she saw her boyfriend, Rangga (Joshua Otay), with another woman. Dania was shocked, not expecting her boyfriend to be cheating on her with another woman behind her back. Afterward, Dania reflected alone in a park. She said she wished someone had given her a hug when she was so vulnerable.

programme.title: Cewek Jetset Kadang Bikin Wah Kadang Hah
programme.desc: One day, Alexa (Nabila Zavira) meets Darman (Erdin Werdrayana). Feeling comfortable, Alexa complains about her father's lack of attention. Darman also complains about his family's financial situation, which is in dire need of money. Alexa suddenly has an idea: Darman kidnaps Alexa and demands a ransom from her father.

programme.desc: Bintang Pantura 6 is back! The legendary 'Juragan' Soimah, joined by her trusty assistant Nunung and business partner Inul Daratista, is on a mission to find 40 talented contestants. Who will make the cut and finally perform on the stage of their dreams?

programme.title: Aku Senang Kalo Kamu Bek Bek Aja?
programme.desc: Mela's marriage to Jordy failed due to her father's disapproval. Dion, a wealthy mama's boy, came to the village and met Mela herding ducks. It turned out that Dion and Mela's mother were friends from college and intended to arrange a marriage for their children.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Yang Salah
programme.desc: Kirana (Jennifer Eve) is heartbroken because her boyfriend suddenly cheated on her with her stepsister, Oliv. programme.title: Cantik Itu Relatif, Pasang Cincin Ke Jarimu Itu Alternatif
programme.desc: A tragedy leaves Bima (Hardi Fadhillah) grieving the loss of his fiancée and a precious ancestral ring. Juminten (Ika Dihardjo), a humble traveling fish vendor, rescues Bima and finds the missing ring. When she tries it on, a miraculous transformation occurs: her dull skin instantly glows, turning the simple fish vendor into a stunning beauty.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 202
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Janji Jangan Love Ugal Ugalan Ya Dek
programme.desc: After failing to get married three times for bizarre reasons, Jelita (Raisya Bawazier) suspects she is being haunted by her past. She remembers cruelly rejecting a chubby boy back in school and hires a friend to find him, convinced he is the source of her bad luck. Little does she know, the boy has transformed into Dani (Masaji Wijayanto), a handsome and athletic man.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 4
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 150
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Bulan Terbelah di Hati Mas Silver
programme.desc: Fikri is a 'Silver Man' (street performer) who falls in love with Bulan, a beautiful municipal police officer (Satpol PP). Despite their frequent romantic encounters, Bulan remains professional. When duty calls, she doesn't hesitate to arrest Fikri, leading to a complicated 'cat-and-mouse' romance between the law and the street.

programme.title: Jerit Malam Berujung Cinta
programme.desc: Karina (Indah Nicole) joins an outdoor adventure club just to get closer to her crush. Dressed inappropriately in a miniskirt and thin clothes for a camping trip, she forgets to bring a jacket. Suddenly, a mysterious man named Tomi (Fendy Chow) hands her a jacket, though no one in the club seems to know who he is. During a terrifying night initiation, Karina realizes there’s more to Tomi than meets the eye.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 4
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: MENCINTAI LEWAT JALUR LANGIT YGY
programme.desc: Arya's love story that has been lived with Caca turns out to have another story, can Arya escape from her habits or even match with another woman?

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 151
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: MODE CARI JODOH MODE ON
programme.desc: Shanice Margaretha is horrified when her parents try to arrange her marriage with Fauzan Nasrul. Determined to escape this 'old fashioned' setup, she tries to run away but gets into an accident that leaves her with amnesia. Ironically, the man who rescues and cares for her is none other than Fauzan, the fiancé she was trying to avoid.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 203
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Seumuran Memang Berkelas Tapi Brondong Lebih Menggoda
programme.desc: Nathan (Alzi Markers) approaches Jamilah (Anjani Dina) with a hidden agenda fueled by his sister, Avril. His goal is to steal Jamilah’s secret family recipe. However, as he gets closer to her, Nathan genuinely falls in love. The romance is shattered when Jamilah discovers that their entire relationship was built on a lie to steal her business secrets.

programme.title: Cantik Itu Relatif, Pasang Cincin Ke Jarimu Itu Alternatif
programme.desc: A tragedy leaves Bima (Hardi Fadhillah) grieving the loss of his fiancée and a precious ancestral ring. Juminten (Ika Dihardjo), a humble traveling fish vendor, rescues Bima and finds the missing ring. When she tries it on, a miraculous transformation occurs: her dull skin instantly glows, turning the simple fish vendor into a stunning beauty.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 203
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Janji Jangan Love Ugal Ugalan Ya Dek
programme.desc: After failing to get married three times for bizarre reasons, Jelita (Raisya Bawazier) suspects she is being haunted by her past. She remembers cruelly rejecting a chubby boy back in school and hires a friend to find him, convinced he is the source of her bad luck. Little does she know, the boy has transformed into Dani (Masaji Wijayanto), a handsome and athletic man.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 5

programme.title: Bulan Terbelah di Hati Mas Silver
programme.desc: Fikri is a 'Silver Man' (street performer) who falls in love with Bulan, a beautiful municipal police officer (Satpol PP). Despite their frequent romantic encounters, Bulan remains professional. When duty calls, she doesn't hesitate to arrest Fikri, leading to a complicated 'cat-and-mouse' romance between the law and the street.

programme.title: Pisang Ambon Buah Kecapi, I Was Born To Make You Hepi
programme.desc: Rama (El Ryan Carlen) is furious after a collision with Ira (Rayna Snova) leaves his banana stock crushed in the street. programme.title: Om Jai Jagdish

programme.title: Koyla
programme.desc: Mute and loyal Shankar tricks Gauri into marriage for his master, but love grows unexpectedly, and she bravely stands by him against every cruel obstacle. Release Year: 1997 Director: Rakesh Roshan

programme.title: Coolie No. 1 (1995)
programme.desc: A clever matchmaker fools Hoshiyar Chand into thinking Raju is rich, sparking hilarious chaos as Raju pretends to be wealthy to win love and teach a lesson. Release Year: 1995 Director: David Dhawan Awards: 3 nominations

programme.title: Karan Arjun
programme.desc: Reborn in different lands, Karan and Arjun reunite through their mother's faith, rising again to take revenge on those who destroyed them in a past life. Release Year: 1995 Director: Rakesh Roshan Awards: Best Action- Bikhu Verma, Best Editing- Sanjay Varma.

programme.title: Jodi No.1
programme.desc: Partners in crime Jai and Veeru set their next target on a rich businessman, Rai Bahadur. Things turn hilarious when both of them fall for his daughters. Release Year: 2001 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Second Hand Husband
programme.desc: Gurpreet and Rajbir want to marry each other but Rajbir's compulsion to pay alimony to his ex-wife Neha seems a hurdle. To get rid of this constraint, they must convince Neha to marry someone.

programme.title: Insan
programme.desc: Amjad's missing brother Munna returns, hiding his identity as terrorist Azhar Khan, pulling the family into shocking truths that threaten their trust and safety. Release Year: 2005 Director: K. Subhash

programme.title: Hamara Dil Aapke Paas Hai
programme.desc: After being assaulted and rejected by her family, a woman finds support with a kind man, but societal stigma and emotional struggles challenge their bond and her path to dignity. Release Year: 2000 Director: Satish Kaushik

programme.title: Love Hostel
programme.desc: Jyothi and Ashu's elopement sparks a deadly chase when her family hires a mercenary, leading to betrayal, bloodshed, and a fight for survival. programme.title: Qaidi Band
programme.desc: Qaidi Band film revolves around seven innocent under-trials, who give a band performance in the prison to get into the good books of the authorities and secure their acquittal.

programme.desc: An 80-year-old man with a penchant for real life games in a story about rights and wrongs.

programme.desc: Four best friends have a secret: after school, they climb up to their hidden tree house. It contains a priceless treasure: books! Each day, the children tell one another stories, travelling to exciting fairy-tale worlds.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Objectif Monde - EP 9
programme.desc: 'Objectif Monde'' proposes special reports and investigations into societal or geopolitical issues, taking the time to analyse the situations thanks to different specialist opinions. This TV5MONDE programme is produced with French-speaking partners (RTBF, RTS, Radio-Canada, France Televisions) and the support of the public French-speaking media.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Mort Sur Terre Battue
programme.desc: During a prestigious tennis tournament, the lifeless body of player Manon Picard is found on the court. The motive appears to be linked to the lucrative contract she signed with a sponsor. Investigators Romain Fabiot and Camille Lauristan are assisted by Vincent Beti, a former player with a troubled past.

programme.title: Chateau ! - EP 62
programme.desc: Perched on a rocky spur, the Chateau de Montreuil-Bellay was built for war. With its 15 defense towers and 600 meters of ramparts, the building resembles an unassailable fortress.

programme.title: Ma Vie, Ma Gueule
programme.desc: « I am 55 years old and I still don't know what my nature is. » Barberie Bichette, known as Barbie, is going through an existential crisis and piles up often comical misadventures. An intimate portrait of a woman in three acts, a comedy, a tragedy, an epiphany.

programme.title: Red Carpet - Deliberations
programme.desc: The jury of the Red Carpet Film Festival meets to establish the awards list after deliberations. But artistic considerations give way to more personal issues.

programme.title: La Maison-Bleue - EP 5
programme.desc: Governor Sylvestre has been kidnapped by members of the FLA. A disappearance that has everyone worried. Caro Majeau presents the new ''bechrel'' to Hamelin and his team. Karine is furious, whilst the population is still suffering regular power cuts.

programme.title: La Maison-Bleue - EP 6
programme.desc: Jessika Walsh reads the FLA manifesto live on national television. The whole population is aghast to learn of the kidnapping of Governor Sylvestre. Hamelin stands firm: he triggers the law that puts the country on a war footing!

programme.title: La Maison-Bleue - EP 7
programme.desc: Rivard has a meeting in his office with the members of the FLA. On the internet, a video showing Karine slapping Hamelin goes viral, just as the French president is visiting Quebec. Tension mounts between Hamelin and the latter...

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Maghreb-Orient Express - EP 30
programme.desc: What's new in the Arab worlds? Journalist Mohamed Kaci hosts those making the cultural headlines in Tunis, Algiers, Rabat, Beirut, Alexandria, Dubai...

programme.title: Movie - Devathayai Kandaein
programme.desc: Babu, a tea vendor, falls in love with Uma, a rich girl, and she too loves him for his sincerity. However, Babu sues her for cheating when she accepts a doctor's proposal to have a secure future.

programme.title: Movie - Parthiban Kanavu
programme.desc: Parthiban, a marketing executive, discovers that the woman he has fallen in love with is the same one that his parents want him to marry. However after marriage, he learns an unexpected truth.

programme.title: Movie - Koottu Puzhukkal
programme.desc: Surya, an unemployed man, comes across his neighbour Manga and falls in love with her. In order to succeed, he must prove himself worthy.

programme.title: Movie - Kudumba Changili
programme.desc: Kudumba Sangili is a 1999 Tamil-language film directed by P. N. Ramachandar. The film stars the producer Kalaipuli G. Sekaran alongside Khushbu, while Manivannan plays a supporting role.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Mugavari
programme.desc: Sridhar, an aspiring music director, has been struggling to get a foothold in the music industry for many years. He falls in love but is willing to put his relationship on a backburner for success.

programme.title: Movie - Kathavarayan
programme.desc: Kathavarayan, an illegal liquor dealer, faces trouble when a student, who vows to expose those who flout the law, gets him arrested.

programme.title: Movie - Manmadan
programme.desc: When Mythili meets Madhan, she's at once attracted and terrified since he looks exactly like the serial killer from her nightmares. In fact, he fits the description of a man who targets women in bars.

programme.title: Movie - Kaalamellam Kaathal Vaazhga
programme.desc: A young college girl, who is a great music enthusiast, becomes friends with a boy who is a good singer. Although they only talk on the phone and have never met, they fall in love with each other.

programme.title: Movie - Azhagu Raja
programme.desc: Azhagu Raja, who owns a cable channel, always mocks Priya, who fails at everything. Eventually, love blossoms between them, but their families' bitter past becomes an obstacle to their marriage.

programme.title: Movie - Kaathalar Dhinam
programme.desc: Raja and Roja meet in an Internet chat room and fall in love, but a series of mishaps prevent them from expressing their love for the other. Later, Raja learns the truth of her identity and is upset.

programme.title: Movie - Kulir 100
programme.desc: Surya's mother enrols him to an elite school in a bid to separate him from his rowdy past. Being a misfit, he only has Babloo and the principal's daughter by his side. Soon, Babloo is found dead.

programme.title: Movie - Kuppi
programme.desc: After the assassination of a prominent leader, Shivrasan takes shelter in a house owned by Ranganath. When the police zero in on the hideout after thorough investigation, they get attacked.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Ragasiya Police
programme.desc: Surya, a police officer, is removed from a criminal case when he is on the verge of tracing the culprit. However, when it is handed to his friend, he gets killed and Surya sets out to catch the killer.

programme.title: Movie - Pournami Naagam
programme.desc: To obtain the 'nagmani', a group of girls attack a cobra pair. Unfortunately, the male cobra dies while his partner escapes. Infuriated, she decides to take revenge.

programme.title: Movie - Thadam
programme.desc: During the investigation of a man's murder, the police find their prime suspect. However, the case gets complicated when the police also learn that their suspect has a lookalike.

programme.title: Movie - Deiva Vaakku
programme.desc: Hamsaveni's divine power earns her respect among the villagers, whereas her brother Vallatharai tries to exploit her power for his personal gain. He goes to the extent of sabotaging her marriage.

programme.title: Movie - Azhagiya Tamil Magan
programme.desc: Guru is an MBA student who is diagnosed with ESP. Since his vision significantly improves, he runs away to Mumbai, but things take an unexpected turn when he sees his lookalike stab his girlfriend.

programme.title: Davis Cup Qualifiers 2026 1st Rd M1: Ecuador vs Australia
programme.desc: 26 teams from the opening round of qualifiers will play for 13 spots at the 2nd round qualifiers in a series decided on a home and away basis played as a best of 5 matches as the 114th edition of the Davis Cup gets under way.

programme.title: ATP Tour Review Show 2026 Rolex Monte-Carlo Masters
programme.desc: A look back at the 119th edition of the Monte Carlo Masters from the Monte Carlo Country Club in Roquebrune-Cap-Martin, France.

programme.title: ATP Tour Review Show 2026 Mutua Madrid Open
programme.desc: A look back at the 24th edition of the Madrid Open from the clay courts of Caja Mágica in Manzanares Park, San Fermín.

programme.title: ASO Cycling Programming 2026 UCI Asia Tour - Tour of Hainan Final H/Ls
programme.desc: The 2026 Tour of Hainan consists of 5 stages, covering a distance of 897.2 kilometers across Hainan province, starting in Haikou and concluding in Sanya, featuring 20 teams.

programme.title: ATP Tour Review Show 2026 Internazionali BNL d’Italia
programme.desc: A look back at the 83rd edition of the Italian Open from the outdoor clay courts of Foro Italico at Rome, Italy.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026 Internationaux de Strasbourg (500) QF 1 & 2 & 3
programme.desc: The Internationaux de Strasbourg is an annual professional women's tennis tournament held in Strasbourg, France. It is a WTA 500 event played on outdoor clay courts at the Tennis Club de Strasbourg.

programme.title: BWF Thomas & Uber Cup Finals 2026 Review Show
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: Heroines 2026 Season 4
programme.desc: Heroines is a timeless series, that tables important discussion that challenges the status quo and celebrates the unique values of women’s sport. Each episode features a dedicated theme such as equality, maternity, leadership, mental health, fan engagement, activism and more, supported by exclusive interviews with leaders at the forefront of women’s sport.

programme.title: ASO Cycling Programming 2026 UCI Pro Series - Presidential Cycling Tour of Turkiye
programme.desc: The Presidential Cycling Tour of Turkey is an annual professional road bicycle racing stage race. It is the only intercontinental cycling tour in the world, often spanning both Europe and Asia. The race typically consists of 8 stages covering diverse terrains.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026 bitpanda Hamburg Open (500) Final
programme.desc: The Bitpanda Hamburg Open is an annual professional men's tennis tournament held at the Am Rothenbaum Tennis Center in Hamburg, Germany. Established in 1892, it is one of the oldest and most traditional tennis tournaments in the world.

programme.title: Badminton Weekly 2026
programme.desc: Badminton Weekly discusses about the standout moments from the tour, as well as insights, unforgettable matches and close shaves as players make their final push to become champion in their own right.

programme.title: Badminton Weekly 2026
programme.desc: Badminton Weekly discusses about the standout moments from the tour, as well as insights, unforgettable matches and close shaves as players make their final push to become champion in their own right.

programme.title: ATP Tour: This Week 2026
programme.desc: This programme tells the story of the ATP tour, its tournaments, personalities behind the tennis, funny feature content and much more.

programme.title: ATP Originals Series The Ring Master: Alexander Bublik
programme.desc: This 43-minute piece delves into the man behind The Ringmaster, as Alexander Bublik gives an exclusive insight into his philosophy and rise to the Top 10.

programme.title: HSBC BWF World Tour 2026 PERODUA Malaysia Masters (S500) Finals
programme.desc: The Malaysia Masters is an annual international badminton tournament held in Malaysia. Held at the Axiata Arena in Kuala Lumpur, it features a total prize purse of US$50,000. The tournament has been held annually since 1985.

programme.title: Davis Cup Qualifiers 2026 1st Rd M1: India vs Netherlands
programme.desc: 26 teams from the opening round of qualifiers will play for 13 spots at the 2nd round qualifiers in a series decided on a home and away basis played as a best of 5 matches as the 114th edition of the Davis Cup gets under way.

programme.title: ATP Tour: This Week 2026
programme.desc: This programme tells the story of the ATP tour, its tournaments, personalities behind the tennis, funny feature content and much more.

programme.desc: This show brings you compelling stories, player personalities, tournament colour and fan engagement as well as exclusive analysis of statistical trends and data.

programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 25/26 MW38 Manchester City v Aston Villa
programme.desc: Each Premier League game from the 2025/26 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Arsenal (MW38) (Live) - EP 373
programme.desc: As a top-flight side, Crystal Palace have never lost when playing their final league match of the season at home (W8 D4), most recently beating Aston Villa 5-0 in 2023-24.

programme.title: PL Rewind 2025/26 - EP 20
programme.desc: Danny Murphy’s first season with Fulham proved to be one to remember. The Cottagers’ 2007/08 campaign saw them go from doomed to defiant in a matter of matches, rescued at the very last moment, with Murphy playing a pivotal role.

programme.title: Aston Villa vs Liverpool (MW37) - EP 361
programme.desc: Aston Villa have won just one of their last 16 Premier League games against Liverpool (D3 L12), a 7-2 home win in October 2020.

programme.title: Burnley vs Wolverhampton Wanderers (MW38) - EP 372
programme.desc: Burnley have lost just one of their last 10 Premier League games against Wolves (W5 D4), and are looking for their second double against them in the competition, after 2020-21.

programme.title: Nottingham Forest vs Bournemouth (MW38) - EP 377
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest are winless in all seven of their Premier League games against Bournemouth (D3 L4), both the most they’ve faced a side without ever winning, and the most the Cherries have faced a side without losing in the competition.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Everton (MW38) - EP 379
programme.desc: Tottenham are winless in their last 10 home league games (D4 L6), their second-longest run in their league history after a 14-game streak between October 1993 and April 1994.

programme.title: West Ham United vs Leeds United (MW38) - EP 380
programme.desc: If West Ham fail to win they will be relegated from the Premier League for the third time, after 2002-03 and 2010-11. It will also mean 2026-27 will be the first top-flight season not to feature any teams beginning with ‘W’ since 1910-11.

programme.title: Sunderland vs Chelsea (MW38) - EP 378
programme.desc: Of all teams to have played in more than five Premier League campaigns, Sunderland have the lowest win rate in their final game of the season, winning just one of their 16 matches (6% - D3 L12).

programme.title: Manchester City vs Aston Villa (MW38) - EP 376
programme.desc: Manchester City have won 19 of their last 20 Premier League home games against Aston Villa, winning each of the last 15 since a 2-0 loss in April 2007.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Arsenal (MW38) - EP 373
programme.desc: As a top-flight side, Crystal Palace have never lost when playing their final league match of the season at home (W8 D4), most recently beating Aston Villa 5-0 in 2023-24.

programme.title: The Big Interview 2025/26 - EP 41
programme.desc: From his early days growing up in the Ivory Coast to taking on some of the world’s best defenders with Manchester United, Amad Diallo’s rise to stardom has been nothing short of miraculous. In the last Big Interview of the season, the Ivorian winger opens up on leaving his home country for Italy, how he thrived on-loan at Sunderland, his hopes and dreams looking to the future at United, and his thoughts on competing at this summer’s World Cup.

programme.title: PL Stories 2025/26 - EP 51
programme.desc: Ten years on from one of football’s greatest sporting shocks, we revisit the extraordinary story of Leicester City’s Premier League title-winning season. Through exclusive interviews with the key figures who lived it, we relive the unity, belief, and impossible run that stunned the football world in 2015-16.

programme.desc: Liverpool lost 3-2 in the reverse fixture against Brentford, but have never lost consecutive league games against the Bees before.

programme.desc: Brighton have the highest win rate against Manchester United of any side in Premier League history both overall (47% - 8/17) and at home (63% - 5/8).

programme.desc: Fulham have lost six of their last eight Premier League games against Newcastle, with both exceptions coming last season (W2).

programme.desc: Manchester City have won 19 of their last 20 Premier League home games against Aston Villa, winning each of the last 15 since a 2-0 loss in April 2007.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Arsenal (MW38) - EP 373
programme.desc: As a top-flight side, Crystal Palace have never lost when playing their final league match of the season at home (W8 D4), most recently beating Aston Villa 5-0 in 2023-24.

programme.title: The Big Interview 2025/26 - EP 41
programme.desc: From his early days growing up in the Ivory Coast to taking on some of the world’s best defenders with Manchester United, Amad Diallo’s rise to stardom has been nothing short of miraculous. In the last Big Interview of the season, the Ivorian winger opens up on leaving his home country for Italy, how he thrived on-loan at Sunderland, his hopes and dreams looking to the future at United, and his thoughts on competing at this summer’s World Cup.

programme.title: PL Stories 2025/26 - EP 51
programme.desc: Ten years on from one of football’s greatest sporting shocks, we revisit the extraordinary story of Leicester City’s Premier League title-winning season. Through exclusive interviews with the key figures who lived it, we relive the unity, belief, and impossible run that stunned the football world in 2015-16.

programme.title: Liverpool vs Brentford (MW38) - EP 375
programme.desc: Liverpool lost 3-2 in the reverse fixture against Brentford, but have never lost consecutive league games against the Bees before.

programme.title: Brighton and Hove Albion vs Manchester United (MW38) - EP 371
programme.desc: Brighton have the highest win rate against Manchester United of any side in Premier League history both overall (47% - 8/17) and at home (63% - 5/8).

programme.title: Fulham vs Newcastle United (MW38) - EP 374
programme.desc: Fulham have lost six of their last eight Premier League games against Newcastle, with both exceptions coming last season (W2).

programme.title: Burnley vs Wolverhampton Wanderers (MW38) - EP 372
programme.desc: Burnley have lost just one of their last 10 Premier League games against Wolves (W5 D4), and are looking for their second double against them in the competition, after 2020-21.

programme.title: Nottingham Forest vs Bournemouth (MW38) - EP 377
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest are winless in all seven of their Premier League games against Bournemouth (D3 L4), both the most they’ve faced a side without ever winning, and the most the Cherries have faced a side without losing in the competition.

programme.title: West Ham United vs Leeds United (MW38) - EP 380
programme.desc: If West Ham fail to win they will be relegated from the Premier League for the third time, after 2002-03 and 2010-11. It will also mean 2026-27 will be the first top-flight season not to feature any teams beginning with ‘W’ since 1910-11.

programme.title: FS MMA Bill Mahood vs. Khalil Ibrahim
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! In this episode from St. Petersburg, Russia, Khalil Ibrahim throws a flurry of fists against Bill Mahood in a three round fight.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Jan Zaveck vs. Andre Berto
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features the IBF Welterweight title bout, Jan Zaveck, aka 'Mr. Sympathicus', (31-1, 18 KOs) vs. Andre Berto (27-1, 21 KOs) from Beau Rivage Resort and Casino in Biloxi, Mississippi, USA, on September 3, 2011. Andre Berto, coming off losing the WBC title to Victor Ortiz, was looking for vengeance against Zaveck.

programme.title: XMA
programme.desc: In this episode we follow one of our martial artists as he goes through a grueling tournament and how he uses technology to help him prepare for it.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Joe Calzaghe vs. Roy Jones, Jr.
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a light heavyweight championship fight featuring Joe Calzaghe and Roy Jones, Jr. This epic bout would prove to be the last of Calzage's career. Many wanted him to retire because he had nothing left to prove, and Calzaghe would officially do so 3 months later. Also on the card, Chris Arreola shows everyone why he is a heavyweight contender.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Jean Pascal vs. Chad Dawson
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. The fight ends in a decision after a controverial headbutt.

programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Keith Thurman vs. Carlos Quintana
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the undefeated Keith Thurman taking on Carlos Quintana. Also on the card, kickboxing super heavyweight legend Daniel Ghita faces off against Brice Guidon.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Fukuoka, Japan welcomes the top talent in the world of martial arts when Karate 1 Premier League returns. Fukuoka will host athletes from across the globe including last season's Grand Winners such as Hikaru Ono and Ayaka Saito competing in their home country. The World Karate Federation expects another tremendous turnout, featuring Olympic medalists and world-ranked competitors, when the Karate 1 Premier League visits the port city of Fukuoka, Japan, on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: Pariah: Sonny Liston
programme.desc: Was Sonny Liston murdered? This four-part documentary series explores the life and untimely death of boxing legend Charles 'Sonny' Liston, who became the heavyweight champion of the world when he knocked out Floyd Patterson in 1962. Unfortunately, just eight years later, he was found dead in his Las Vegas home from an alleged heroin overdose. Suspicion regarding the real cause of his death has continued to this day. Episode 2 of 4.

programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Women's Forms Championship at the ISKA US Open Championships held at Disney World, Orlando, FL, USA.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Tokyo Grand Slam where the home nation is looking to dominate as they fielded 7 of Japan's 8 world champions. Plus we catch up with Japan's brother and sister superstars, the Abe's.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Andre Berto vs. Luis Collazo
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Andre Berto defending the WBC welterweight title against former WBA champion Luis Collazo. Each fighter had their own share of getting stunned throughout the bout, and the judges' decision at the end will have some controversy. Also on the card, kickboxing takes center stage as super heavyweight legend Daniel Ghita takes on Gokhan Saki.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. From the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, Show 1 features Kotoshoho, Terunofuji, Hokutofuji and Tochinoshin.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Amir Mansour vs. Fred Kassi
programme.desc: Wide World Of Fights includes all styles of fighting from around the world in one show! This episode features a Heavyweight bout between an once-beaten Amir Mansour and big-hitting Fred Kassi, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 16
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 17
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. "If only we had more Duggee's" muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 18
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 19
programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 20
programme.desc: Loveable Duggee and the Squirrels return with more educational fun.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 18

programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 13
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 14
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 102
programme.desc: Po eats Tubby Custard and gets a messy bib. Po washes the bib clean and hangs it out to dry before eating more Tubby Custard with Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa.

programme.title: Teletubbies Ready Steady Go! (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing and follow their dreams.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 30
programme.desc: Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home, but Dad says it's not the right thing to do.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 31
programme.desc: When mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 32
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 33
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 34
programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23) - EP 8
programme.desc: While working on the Brazilian Railway, Thomas and Gabriela get ready for the Batucada carnival at the docks.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23) - EP 9
programme.desc: After being scolded for making a mistake, Diesel plays a trick on Rebecca to try and get the other engines in trouble.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23) - EP 10
programme.desc: After Thomas makes a mistake with an important silk delivery in India, he causes chaos and confusion by not seeking help.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 36
programme.desc: The Go Jetters master the art of mindfulness to save the Giant Buddha of Leshan in China.

programme.desc: Preston needs Mojo and Bo to pull his big balloon to a place where he can snap a picture of a rare bird. But his balloon gets loose, and Mojo and Bo need to get Preston back on the ground.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 9

programme.desc: Mike and Jersey go hog wild for a four-generation carny collection complete with carousel horses, toy tanks, and bumper cars. Down the road in New Hampshire, the guys head to Roger's analogue laboratory.

programme.title: A Brief History Of Cricket Down Under: The 80s S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: With a combination of vision and confidence, some extraordinary and brave '80s captains set lofty standards for their team to follow. This episode presents a critique of those who led their countries on Australian soil.

programme.title: Landline (2026) - EP 15
programme.desc: Hosted by award-winning journalist Pip Courtney, Landline is Australia's only national agricultural television program covering stories from Australia's rural and regional heartland.

programme.title: Insiders (2026) - EP 17
programme.desc: 2026 is a defining year for the government and the nation. As tensions rise across the globe, what does it mean for our security? David Speers and the panel cut though the spin and reveal the power plays behind the politics.

programme.title: Offsiders (2026) - EP 16
programme.desc: Abbey Gelmi and the panel cover the leadup to Rugby League's State of Origin Game 1, plus the countdown to the FIFA World Cup and the latest from the NRL, Super Rugby, Super Netball and more.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026) - EP 103
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026) - EP 103
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings (2026) - EP 103
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Gemma Veness.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon (2026) - EP 103
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Kathryn Robinson brings you today's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter.

programme.title: The Matter Of Facts S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Disinformation campaigns prove shockingly innovative in this investigation of digital deception on the international stage - from Paris to the Philippines. We see how, when truth is under attack, democracy is weakened.

programme.title: The Mission S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: ABC Australia delivers a mix of programmes including news and current affairs, sports, comedies, drama, documentaries, education and award-winning children's programmes.

programme.title: Art Works S3 - EP 8
programme.desc: Namila checks out what's on at Heide; Reuben Kaye talks cabaret, community and catharsis; we talk to Daniel Riley, Australian Dance Theatre's first Indigenous Artistic Director; and meet Malian musician Viex Farka Toure.

programme.title: End Game with Tony Armstrong S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Tony investigates how athlete activism can combat racism in sport, questioning why Australia often resists outspoken athletes like Adam Goodes.

programme.title: Alone Australia S3 - EP 7
programme.desc: One survivalist's body begins to shut down another is forced to reckon with their enemies and a wildlife encounter threatens another's chance at winning.

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien (2026) - EP 103
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: A Bite To Eat With Alice S1 - EP 33

programme.desc: After a 1,536km journey, the Earth-Cleaning Bros arrive in Olang Ol, a pristine nomadic village. They build their own ger and even try milking yaks!

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: A busy Theresa is desperate to plan a girls' night with her besties. While at lunch, Spirit pulls Theresa into a reading that finds a departed mom asking her daughter's boyfriend for a proposal!

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips - EP 10
programme.desc: James butts heads when the competition, fellow flipper Rob, brings him a potential project: a split-level property with a massive yard in a prime neighbourhood. Rob's short on funds and full of confidence.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16) - EP 37
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia is in Hong Kong! After exploring the culinary capital, the first challenge is a Hong Kong style Mystery Box, set on Victoria Harbour.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: Julie and Julian spend most weekends escaping the hustle of city life by sailing, swimming and enjoying the coastal lifestyle. Now they have decided to turn their ocean escapes into their main job.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany - EP 18
programme.desc: Author and chef Sara Moulton joins Rachael in her Tuscan kitchen to create a meal using ingredients from Rachael's pantry. Sara prepares a free-form crostata using a variety of vegetables.

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2 - EP 3
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2) - EP 60
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to make a fun and delicious beef fajita dinner cooked a la plancha. The beef is marinated in a spicy sauce, served on charred tortillas and accompanied by a platter of bean-dip nachos.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1) - EP 9

programme.title: You Better Watch Out

programme.title: Razor

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. programme.title: Faces of Africa
programme.desc: Faces of Africa is a topical magazine that showcases the diversity of the continent. Faces of Africa is about people. programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China’s rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. Local correspondents and local production teams provide authoritative and in-depth stories from across the region. Africa Live is an objective and comprehensive look at every facet of African life.

programme.title: Asia Today
programme.desc: Asia Today highlights the latest news and social developments across Asia. Correspondents in over a dozen countries report on the region’s top stories as they happen. Analysts bring Asian perspective to topical and developing issues. Asia Today also emphasizes the diverse cultures and lifestyles of the world’s most populous continent.

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: What the Villains Have to Say
programme.desc: Cockroaches, Carbon dioxide, Unwanted hair... Villains are anathema to the public as being "dirty, noxious, and ugly." But even villains have a point they want you to hear! In this program, we look at their amazing abilities revealed by the latest research, as well as the real villains, who are actually a little bit fascinating!

programme.title: Historical Drama "BROTHERS IN ARMS" Ep. 20 (R)
programme.desc: Nobunaga is enraged when Hideyoshi withdraws from the campaign against the Uesugi and returns without permission, placing him under house arrest and ordering his execution. As the Hashiba retainers plead for mercy, news arrives that Matsunaga Hisahide has betrayed him once again. Narrowly escaping death, Hideyoshi and Koichiro enter negotiations with Hisahide, conveying Nobunaga’s terms that rebellion will be forgiven if he surrenders his prized tea utensil, the Hiragumo.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE (R)

programme.title: News: Good Morning, Japan

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 41
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: BS Special "Dull Gray Diamonds" (R)
programme.desc: In western India lies a town known as the "Diamond City," where rough diamonds from around the world are cut and polished by low‑paid craftsmen who have long supported the global diamond industry. Now, lab‑grown diamonds-mass‑produced through science and sold at less than one‑tenth the price of natural stones-are rapidly reshaping the market. As natural diamond prices fall by 40 percent and major companies suffer huge losses, life in the Diamond City itself is being shaken.

programme.title: Drama 10 "Mojiko Tenderness Brothers" Ep. 4 (R)
programme.desc: Set at a convenience store in Mojiko, Kitakyushu, this story follows an unlikely pair: a strikingly handsome manager and a wild, enigmatic man who seems able to handle anything. Together, they take on impossible problems, unfolding a tale filled with humor, mystery, and heartfelt human drama.

programme.title: Drama Serial "Massan" Encore Ep. 104
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 42
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Drama Serial "Massan" Encore Ep. 105
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Recipe for Love - EP 30
programme.desc: In the rapidly developing town of Onjeong, two rival medical families - one modern and one traditional - wage a neighbourhood feud fuelled by a long-standing grudge. This drama follows their chaotic journey as they unravel decades of misunderstanding to find healing and love.

programme.title: Noona, You Are A Woman To Me - EP 6
programme.desc: Age is just a number; attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic "Noonas" (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally-driven romances in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: Young Lady and Gentleman - EP 25
programme.desc: To Dandan, her family is an obstacle. She eventually leaves home and starts working as a resident tutor. The more time she spends with the kids and their father Youngguk, the more she falls for him.

programme.desc: A 30-year-old woman suddenly has a new father who is three years younger than her. She doesn't trust him much at first, but as time passes by, she accepts him as family. This new father is always on her side. He loves her unconditionally. What would happen to them?

programme.title: Our Happy Days - EP 36
programme.desc: A perfectionist architect and a cheerful AI developer clash over a business takeover. As their lives intertwine, they navigate family rivalries and corporate stakes to find unexpected comfort and love.

programme.title: Pearl in Red - EP 51
programme.desc: In this intense revenge chronicle, two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: Cabbage Your Life - EP 5
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family "reboot" drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.title: Travel Together - EP 631
programme.desc: A real-life working travel show, each trip is led by Dou Zhikong and Wang Chuan-yi, who are composed of a "handsome working group" of artist guests. They travel together to get away from the hustle and bustle of the city and explore the most healing rural secrets.

programme.desc: When "Master Ding" Li Jiading and "Third Sister" Xiao Xiuxiang meet, a kitchen battle is about to begin! Each episode features guests who present challenges to Master Ding and Third Sister, requiring them to use the same ingredients or themes to create dishes with distinct styles.

programme.title: Big Boys Club
programme.desc: Each episode of Big Boys Club invites singers, artistes as well as people from different walks of life as guests onto the show, participating in relaxed interviews and discussing current trends.

programme.title: Sword and Fairy 1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Adapted from game Chinese Paladin, the story follows Li Xiaoyao, a waiter with hero dreams, and Zhao Ling'er, a descendant of Nuwa. They face challenges in search of the Spirit Pearl, courageously embarking on a journey to save the world.

programme.title: News At 18:30 & Global View & What's On Today
programme.desc: Bringing you the news from Hong Kong, the mainland and around the world every evening at 6:30pm.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2815
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.title: The Map Of Truth - EP 7
programme.desc: Zhuang Yichen creates an online "mystery map" channel exposing the supernatural elements of Hong Kong. Skeptical influencer Bi Ping challenges his claims, sparking rivalries and revelations that force both to confront hidden truths.

programme.title: Treasure At Dawn - EP 11
programme.desc: A young doctor who is wrongly accused in a deadly case sets out to uncover the truth behind a mysterious "Heavenly Book". Along the way, he teams up with a clever noblewoman and a witty performer as they investigate a web of secrets in Liangzhou.

programme.title: Don't You Know Life is a Journey?
programme.desc: Uncover the unique life stories of people from mainland China, Japan and other Asian regions, getting a closer look at their attitudes, choices, family, career, ideals and values.

programme.title: EXTRA
programme.desc: Keep up with the news on the entertainment circle in Hong Kong and all over the world, with reports on the latest drama series, movies, concert highlights, award ceremonies and more.

programme.title: News Roundup
programme.desc: Reporting major news from Hong Kong, across the Taiwan Strait, and around the world, keeping you informed about important events as well as updates in the world of sports.

programme.title: Global View
programme.desc: Curated by seasoned journalists, Global View guides you to look at the world with a global perspective - broadening your horizons, expanding your understanding of the news, and enriching your knowledge.

programme.title: Golden City - EP 421
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Your Honor - EP 6
programme.desc: Kang So-young attacks Gang-heon at his weakest link. Pan-ho evades Gang-heon’s watch for a lunch appointment, but he meets an unexpected figure.

programme.title: Wonderland of Love - EP 11
programme.desc: The emperor's grandson Li Ni (Xu Kai) is forced to take on the responsibility of quelling the rebellion. He meets the ambitious Cui Lin (Jing Tian), who is the General’s daughter under disguise. They cross paths on the battlefields and fall in love.

programme.title: Wonderland of Love - EP 12
programme.desc: The emperor's grandson Li Ni (Xu Kai) is forced to take on the responsibility of quelling the rebellion. He meets the ambitious Cui Lin (Jing Tian), who is the General’s daughter under disguise. They cross paths on the battlefields and fall in love.

programme.title: Gone With The Rain - EP 37
programme.desc: In the ancient Jing, a young Emperor has just ascended but the state is torn apart by a tumultuous rebellion. In this harsh world, Mo Xi (Zhang Nan), the niece of Official Bai, and her cousin Bai Feng Yao (Wang Yu Wen) team up to avoid a terrible fate.

programme.title: Light of Dawn - EP 18
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A car accident uncovers a set of long-buried remains, binding orphan Gao Feng (Zhang Ruoyun) and wealthy heiress Wu Feifei (Ma Sichun) together. To unravel the mystery of their origins, they join forces with the police to dig up hidden darkness under the city.

programme.title: Double Happiness - EP 1
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Xu Kai Xin (Zhang Yu Qi), single mother of two, and Mei Cheng Yi (Han Geng), a single father of two, as they navigate the chaos of parenting four kids, growing closer through life’s unpredictable twists.

programme.title: Honour - EP 9
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Three lifelong friends turned elite lawyers work at a firm defending female crime victims. Their unshakeable bond is tested when a buried 20-year secret resurfaces amid explosive cases.

programme.title: Your Honor - EP 6
programme.desc: Kang So-young attacks Gang-heon at his weakest link. Pan-ho evades Gang-heon’s watch for a lunch appointment, but he meets an unexpected figure.

programme.title: Not Others - EP 5
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Kim Eun Mi (Jeon Hye Jin), a careless physical therapist, and Kim Jin Hee (Choi Soo Young), a free-spirited adult daughter who works as a police officer, living together like ‘strangers’. Faced with the complexities of life, can they mend the rift between them?

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 21
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2217
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 889
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 25
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Heavy rain has caused serious car accidents, and many people are injured. Yat-yin, Kin-pong and other medical staff try their best to save the injured. They even perform emergency surgery under the difficult conditions at the scene. The activities are captured by reporters’ cameras.

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul - EP 37
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2217
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Treasures Around - EP 5
programme.desc: The quirky and clever Shan Dandan (Xu Lu), who dreams of becoming a jade appraiser, crosses paths with Pei Pei (Bi Wen Jun), the wayward heir to a jade business. Initially at odds, the two develop a love-hate relationship as they face challenges together.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 889
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Breaking the Shadows - EP 8
programme.desc: Summer 2017, a rain-soaked southern town is rocked by the discovery of dismembered remains. Officer Han Qing (Sun Li) investigates while searching for her missing partner, Zhong Wei (Luo Jin). As the case unfolds, a major drug trafficking operation unveils…

programme.title: Darkside Of The Moon - EP 23

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 1

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 2
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] After the traffic accident, no one knows if Yeung-tin is dead or alive. To stabilize Fong share price and prevent Chiu-kwan from worrying, Hok-lai and Hok-kan and their third younger bother Fong Hok-yin decide to suppress the news about Yeung-tin falling into a coma. Hok-lai openly apologizes for the Grandpa Wong incident and promises to pay compensation.

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul - EP 39
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2219
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Treasures Around - EP 7
programme.desc: The quirky and clever Shan Dandan (Xu Lu), who dreams of becoming a jade appraiser, crosses paths with Pei Pei (Bi Wen Jun), the wayward heir to a jade business. Initially at odds, the two develop a love-hate relationship as they face challenges together.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 891
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: ONE GOOD TURN DESERVES ANOTHER - EP 8
programme.desc: Young and beautiful Yee (Maggie Cheung) was held responsible for murdering a millionaire for his estate. She employed Shek (Chan Kai Tai) to defend for her. Shek was attracted to her mysterious background and fell for her seduction._x000D__x000D_It turned out that Yee was in fact the step-sister of Shek’s wife Shan (So Yuk Wah). She blamed Shan’s mother for taking her father away and she swore to take revenge. She seduced Shek and made him divorce Shan.

programme.title: Colourful Life - EP 12
programme.desc: The CHENG family has been running a business in the dyeing industry for several generations. Master CHENG and his wife died early. His mistress, SHUI KWUN DING FUNG (TSUI SUJK YEE), has since been running the business and keeps the family in shape._x000D__x000D_The eldest son, CHI SHING (LAW MONG), is a simple and straightforward person. He has a good and helpful wife, CHOW MONA (SO YUK WAH, LOUISA). The second son, CHI POK (YUEN SIU CHEUNG, LOUIS), is a short-tempered man.

programme.title: AI Romantic - EP 14
programme.desc: High-end AI robot Bo (Ali Lee) accidentally loses her way while she is being shipped from the factory. She eventually ends up among a family of weirdos in the realm of human beings. AI company employee Koo Ka-lim (6 Wing) thinks he has found some treasure and arbitrarily keeps Bo for himself. To help four family members in the Koo household handle all kinds of strange tasks, Bo switches on her self-learning function and begins to experience myriad human emotions and desires.

programme.title: AI Romantic - EP 15
programme.desc: High-end AI robot Bo (Ali Lee) accidentally loses her way while she is being shipped from the factory. She eventually ends up among a family of weirdos in the realm of human beings. AI company employee Koo Ka-lim (6 Wing) thinks he has found some treasure and arbitrarily keeps Bo for himself. To help four family members in the Koo household handle all kinds of strange tasks, Bo switches on her self-learning function and begins to experience myriad human emotions and desires.

programme.title: The Conquest - EP 37
programme.desc: During the Spring and Autumn Period, ancient China was divided into small kingdoms ruled by various powerful regional warlords. This was a time of massive upheaval when a myriad of dramatic stories took place. The more than 20-year-long fight among the man of virtue FAN LAI (CHEN KUN), the persistent and dauntless AU TSIN (LAU CHUNG YAN, DAMIAN), the legendary hero FU CHAI (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE) and the mesmerizing beauty SAI SZE (KWOK, SONIJA) is a true classic that will long be remembered.

programme.title: Recipes To Live By - EP 23
programme.desc: During the prosperous Tang Dynasty, Ding Yishan became a "hellish food critic" because of his "golden tongue". He was both an enemy and a friend of the famous chef Gai Zhaotian. At the same time, he fell in love with the cheerful Hu woman Shi Rou. They then competed in cooking skills to determine who was better in terms of "taste". Yishan accidentally discovered his background. It turned out that his biological father died unjustly, and Zhaotian and his son were also suspected.

programme.title: Tiger Mom Blues - EP 14
programme.desc: Raised by "Tiger Mom" YUE KAI-YIN (Michelle Yim), stay-at-home mom CHA HEUNG-SIN (Elena Kong), who is deeply influenced by her strict upbringing, adopts an autocratic parenting style to raise her two daughters, leading to resentment among them, especially her elder daughter YIM SIN-YUE (Kong Ka Man). The two are always at each other's throats.

programme.title: Treasure of Destiny - EP 6
programme.desc: Pork butcher stall lady boss Chu Ying-kiu (Katy Kung) has innate mystical power. But she is inflicted with some strange illness that causes her to grow a beard. She hopes to find the elixir mentioned in Sutra of Forty-two Chapters for treating her illness. Over the years, university Chinese language professor Cheung King (Moses Chan) has been passionate about finding this legendary treasure. However, he has been suffering from insomnia as he was devastated in an incident.

programme.title: Legend Of Demigods - EP 9
programme.desc: HESHEN (Ruco Chan) supports PRINCE YONGYAN (Shaun Tam) to accede to the throne. Following QIANLONG’s death, EMPEROR JIAQING manages to convince HESHEN’s son FENGSHEN-YINDE (Matthew Ho) and confidant FUCHANG’AN (Joel Chan) to turn their coat, seeking to sweepingly eliminate HESHEN and his cronies. But, HESHEN comes prepared.

programme.title: Where The Legend Begins - EP 22
programme.desc: FOU (CHOI SIU FUN, ADA) is a beauty living in the time of the Three Kingdoms. A legendary military strategist, CAO CAO (LAU DAN), treats her family well because of her. Everyone is stunned by her beauty, including CAO’s sons, PEI (CHAN HO), who is a powerful warrior and will do anything for FOU; and ZHI (MA CHUN WAI, STEVEN), who is intelligent and a good lover. FOU likes them both at first, but she finds out that PEI is a mean person and decides to love ZHI.
